data.title: epic: skogai-git orchestrator skill (gita + worktrunk + gptodo)
data.description:
## Summary

Epic for creating a `skogai-git` skill that orchestrates three specialized sub-skills into a unified git workflow:

* **gita** — multi-repo status, fetch, bulk operations across `~/.local/src/`
* **worktrunk** — worktree lifecycle (create, switch, merge, ship, remove)
* **gptodo** — task-aware worktrees, spawn agents, issue sync

## Sub-tasks

- [ ] #8 — create worktrunk specialist skill
- [ ] #9 — extract gptodo specialist skill from gptme
- [ ] #10 — create skogai-git orchestrator skill

## Motivation

These three tools are used together constantly but currently require manual coordination. The orchestrator skill should:

1. Route to the right sub-skill based on intent
2. Provide composite workflows (e.g., "pick issue → create worktree → work → ship → clean up")
3. Keep each sub-skill independently usable

Note: gita skill already exists at `skills/gita/SKILL.md` — may need minor refinement.

## Consolidates inbox items

* git orchestrator skill: wt + gptodo + gita unified (was GH#40)
* worktrunk specialist skill (was GH#43)
* gptodo specialist skill (was GH#41)
* refine gita skill for subagent use (was GH#42)
* git flow skill: branching strategy, PR workflow, worktree lifecycle (was GH#32)
